title: Strongy
description: A Weapon based mod that adds way too much content.
body:
Strongy is an RPG rivaling the likes of RLcraft, which you'll find fun if you like overpowered mods. This mod adds tons of new things, including new weapon sets, tools, mobs, bosses, a new entity (being worked on) and alot more!

Strongy is an mod made with [Furfsky Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn)

Has colored names :)
"Approved by Tylerr (Furfsky Head Admin)"

The pause is over :) (Recommend ideas in the discord server https://discord.gg/jqrQG3HCVk)

Curseforge Link: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/strongy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/strongy)
